---
name: Documentation Issue
about: Report missing, unclear, or incorrect documentation
title: '[DOCS] '
labels: 'documentation'
assignees: ''
---

## Documentation Type
- [ ] README
- [ ] API Documentation
- [ ] Helm Charts Guide
- [ ] Installation Guide
- [ ] Configuration Guide
- [ ] Troubleshooting Guide
- [ ] Architecture Documentation
- [ ] Contributing Guide
- [ ] Website/Blog
- [ ] Other (specify below)

## Location
**File/Page:** [e.g., `/docs/installation.md`, `https://vikukumar.github.io/Pushpaka/install`]

**Section:** [e.g., "Prerequisites", "Quick Start"]

## Issue Description
What's wrong with the documentation?
- [ ] Missing information
- [ ] Unclear or confusing
- [ ] Outdated/incorrect
- [ ] Formatting issues
- [ ] Poor readability

Describe the issue:

## Current Documentation
```
Quote or describe the current documentation here
```

## Suggested Improvement
How should this documentation be improved?

```
Suggested text/structure here
```

## Context
- **Pushpaka Version:** [e.g., v1.0.0]
- **Deployment Mode:** [e.g., Docker Compose, Kubernetes]
- **Audience:** [Who should understand this? e.g., Developers, DevOps, End Users]

## Related Resources
- Links to related documentation
- Links to related issues/discussions
- External references

## Checklist
- [ ] I've checked existing documentation
- [ ] I've searched similar issues/discussions
- [ ] I can provide concrete examples
- [ ] This would help other users
